column1: Question
What is the name of your company and when was it founded?
Where is your company headquartered?
How many enterprise clients do you currently serve?
Do you offer 24/7 technical support?
What is your average support response time for critical issues?
Do you provide a dedicated Customer Success Manager?
What is your refund policy?
What pricing plans do you offer?
Do you offer a free trial?
Where do you host your cloud infrastructure?
Do you have a disaster recovery environment?
Are you SOC2 compliant?
Are you GDPR compliant?
Are you ISO 27001 certified?
How is customer data encrypted?
Do you sell or share customer data with third parties?
How often is customer data backed up?
Do you support Single Sign-On (SSO)?
What identity providers do you support?
Do you offer role-based access control?
Do you provide audit logs?
What is your guaranteed uptime SLA?
How do you communicate planned maintenance?
Do you have a public status page?
What file formats do you support for RFP uploads?
What integrations do you support natively?
Do you offer a REST API?
What is your typical implementation timeline?
Do you support multiple languages?
How many RFPs has your platform processed to date?
